name: Selumetinib
description: Selumetinib is under investigation for the treatment of Carcinoma, Thymic, Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer, and Carcinoma, Small Cell Lung. AZD6244 has been investigated for the treatment and basic science of Melanoma, Solid Tumours, Breast Cancer, Non Small Cell Lung Cancer, and Non Small Cell Lung Carcinoma, among others.
